arts.sum: Barcelona win the Copa del Rey for the 32nd time in their history courtesy of a 3-2 victory over bitter rivals Real Madrid in Saturday night's El Clasico.

arts.sum: Updates from the 9pm BST kick-off at La Cartuja Contact Luke McLaughlin | Live scores around Europe 12min: Lamine Yamal makes a bright run down the right for Barcelona. The score is nil-nil. “I’d love to watch the game but a 10pm kick-off is getting a bit too near my bedtime,” emails Mark. “How do the players put up with it? It must be hard to be at your peak performance level so late in the day. Good night. Continue reading...
